genre_refs: Cinco de Mayo / margarita-and-sombrero stereotype imagery
description: AI-generated image set beneath a large overhead sign reading 'UNITED STATES BORDER'. An American flag is at left; green lane signs reading 'READY LANE' and 'CARS' and bollards are visible. In the foreground two older men in dark business suits and ties sit at a small table wearing brightly colored sombreros and holding two margarita glasses together. On the table is a hand-lettered sign reading 'I LOVE ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS', next to a bowl of tortilla chips, a bowl of salsa, a small potted cactus, and a striped placemat. The image is high-saturation and photo-realistic. The tweet text reads 'Happy Cinco de Mayo to all who celebrate!'.
notable_text: UNITED STATES BORDER | I LOVE ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS
